subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Kinney et al, spoken on 1909-08-21
subcodes.first_line: Whosoever turns to the Kingdom must neither be affected by poverty or wealth... While the Master was in Teheran and the family was pillaged, for three days and nights they were left absolutely foodless... Man comes into the world naked
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @suffering and imprisonment
